profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Inter Delta Tbk engages in trading of film equipment, micro film, chemicals for photography, and electronic equipment in Indonesia. The company's products include photo printing paper, films and cameras, photo and paper processing chemicals, and others. PT Inter Delta Tbk was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Jakarta Utara, Indonesia. PT Inter Delta Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Peak Aim Development Limited.
